title: Agent Metrics Real-Time
user_story: As a project manager observing the AIOX dashboard, I want to see real agent metrics from Supabase (not mock data), so that I can monitor actual agent performance and understand what's happening in my system in real-time.

primary: Dashboard AgentsMonitor displays agents from GET /api/metrics endpoint
Each agent card shows: agent name/ID, status (running/idle/offline), latency_ms, success_rate%, cpu_percentage, memory_usage_mb
Data updates automatically every 5 seconds via polling
Last updated X seconds ago timestamp visible on AgentsMonitor
Live Data badge/indicator appears when data is real (not mock)
Loading skeleton shows while fetching data from API
Error toast/alert displays if API call fails
Graceful fallback shows when API is unavailable
secondary: Manual Refresh Now button to force immediate update
Agent status changes trigger subtle animation
Hover tooltip shows full agent details
Sort agents by status, latency, or success_rate

testing_strategy: Agents display with correct data from Supabase
Data refreshes every 5 seconds in browser DevTools
Last updated X seconds ago increments correctly
